user.title: Select Cover Entity
user.description: Select the underlying cover entity to add tilting functionality.

config.title: Configure Tilting Cover
config.description: Configure the timing and naming for your tilting cover.

data_description.name: Friendly name for the enhanced cover entity
data_description.travel_time: Time required for full 0%↔100% position change
data_description.slat_rotation_time: Time for slat rotation during movement

error.entity_not_found: Selected entity does not exist or is not available.
error.not_cover_entity: Selected entity is not a cover entity.
error.already_has_tilt: Selected cover already has built-in tilt functionality.
error.already_configured: Selected cover is already configured with Tilting Cover.

abort.already_configured: This cover entity is already configured with Tilting Cover.
abort.no_covers_available: No suitable cover entities found. All covers either already have tilt functionality or are already configured.
abort.unknown: An unexpected error occurred during setup.

init.title: Update Tilting Cover Options
init.description: Update the configuration for your tilting cover
